modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Confusion regarding degree audit results for graduation.

full_description_text:  
I just checked my degree audit, and honestly, I'm really confused about what it all means. I thought I was on track for graduation, but now I'm not so sure. The information seems complicated, and I can't figure out if I'm missing any requirements or if everything is okay. It would be great to get some clarity on this!
short_description: Confusion regarding degree audit results for graduation.
